---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Sift
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Motivation

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What is the use case?
     Be specific — describe the workflow or pain point that prompted this. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature you would like. Be as concrete as possible.
     If this is a new command filter, include example input and expected output. -->

**Example (if applicable):**
```bash
# Command
sift <proposed usage>

# Expected output
<what you'd like to see>
```

## Command Family

<!-- Is this related to a specific command family? -->

- [ ] `git`
- [ ] `grep` / `rg`
- [ ] `cat` / `read`
- [ ] `xcodebuild`
- [ ] New command family (describe below)
- [ ] Core infrastructure / CLI UX
- [ ] Configuration
- [ ] Tracking / metrics

## Impact on Existing Behavior

<!-- Would this change or break any existing behavior?
     Would it affect exit code propagation or passthrough? -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider?
     Why is this approach better for Sift's design goals? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Links to relevant issues, PRs, documentation, or external references. -->
